questions.q: On May 17, 2026, the WHO declared a global public health emergency over an outbreak of which rare Ebola strain in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda?
In health news trending through mid-May 2026, the condition formerly known as Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS) was officially renamed to PMOS. What does PMOS stand for?

Published in Nature and circulating heavily in May 2026 health discussions, a clinical trial demonstrated that which antiviral pill cuts the risk of COVID-19 infection when used as a post-exposure preventative?
